caption: A man wearing a white traditional robe and a black cap sits at a table with a microphone in front of him, appearing in a split-screen broadcast. To his right, a smaller inset box displays a man in a red cap, identified by on-screen text as "OLUSOLA OYEKANMI POLITICAL ANALYST" from "LAGOS," with the heading "ON THE PHONE" above him. The "plustv" logo is visible in the top left of the main screen. A purple and red graphic background frames the layout. A white banner at the bottom of the screen displays the text "PLUS POLITICS" and the headline "NIGERIA NEEDS ME – BOLA TINUBU." In the bottom margins, there are calls to "WATCH ONLINE" and "SUBSCRIBE," along with the web address "WWW.YOUTUBE.COM/PLUSTVAFRICA" and social media icons. The man in the white robe remains relatively still, gazing slightly to the side, with very little visual change across the sequence.
